purpose: New semantic classes discovered during Stage C Roboflow import. These are kept separate from the approved catalogue until final review/integration.

entries.reason: Distinct parking sign for accessible/OKU parking; not the same as generic parking.
Bridge-specific warning sign; not the same as general road narrows.
Blue mandatory motorcycle-only sign; not the same as no motorcycles or motor vehicles only.
Lane/traffic merges toward the left; different from traffic merging from the left.
Diverging carriageway/route split sign; visually and semantically different from divided road begins.
Towing/tow-away restriction sign; not the same as no parking or no stopping.

excluded_source_labels.reason: Traffic cone object, not a road sign class.
Classification source mixes left and right chevron boards under one direction-losing label.
